creator: naddy@mips.rhein-neckar.de
text:
The print/ghostscript5 and print/ghostscript55 ports don't build
due to a hardcoded reference to libpng-1.0.3 (graphics/png), which
has been updated to 1.0.5.

The appended patches mereley update the hardcoded version number.
A more robust solution is required. Any ideas?
